quotes.text: A portrait must contain a searching and a deep statement of the human condition, a reaching out toward the mystery that is another person, whether the person exists in your mind, or physical reality, or both. A portrait must contain a journey into personality, and the technique and the form will then follow naturally and spontaneously.
quotes.translation: 一幅肖像必须包含对人类处境的探索与深刻陈述，必须伸向另一个人的神秘本质——无论此人存在于你的心智、物质实相或两者兼具。肖像必须包含一次人格的旅程，而技巧与形式会随之自然而然地涌现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I have spoken of "you," yet this must not be confused with the "you" that you often think you are -- the ego alone, for the ego is only a portion of You; it is that expert part of your personality that deals directly with the contents of your conscious mind, and is concerned most directly with the material portions of your experience.
quotes.translation: 我所说的"你"，不可与你常以为的"你"混淆——那个仅指自我（ego）的你，因为自我只是你（You）的一部分；它是你人格中直接处理意识心内容的专业部分，最直接关注你经验中的物质层面。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I did not experience it. Ruburt experienced it. I commented on Ruburt's experience ... In his experience, Ruburt is also free enough so that he can open up certain channels of his mind that then comment upon his activity. Some of those channels lead to my reality. But, I am not some spooky Big Brother experiencing his reality for him!
quotes.translation: 我并未经历它。是鲁柏经历了它。我评论了鲁柏的经历……在他的经历中，鲁柏也足够自由，能够打开心智的某些通道，这些通道随后会评论他的活动。其中一些通道通向我的实相。但我并非某个阴森的老大哥在替他经历实相！
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

In that note I presented some material on ancient connections with the name, Seth, then quoted Seth on the subject of names from the ESP class session for April 17, 1973. For instance:)
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Then there was a love of detail and planning, and the ability to form in the mind complicated building plans for others to carry out. The personality was often involved then in the flowering period of civilization, when such building was usually carried on. The artistic ability is connected with the detailed drawings done in the past.
quotes.translation: 那时存在着对细节与规划的热爱，以及在心中形成复杂建筑方案让他人执行的能力。当这类建筑通常兴盛的文明繁盛期，人格往往参与其中。艺术能力与过去绘制的精细图纸相关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Some discipline is of course needed. But a sense of spontaneity is most important, and indeed a momentary lapse of critical attention. I bring this up now since there is a connection here, if you will excuse a pun, but there is a connection here with the electrical field. You realize now that psychological conditions have their existence within electrical reality, and so certain frames of mind will then be duplicated within the electrical field.
quotes.translation: 当然需要一些纪律，但自发性感最为重要，实际上还需要暂时放松批判性的注意力。我现在提起这一点，是因为这里与电场存在关联——请原谅我玩个文字游戏——但确实与电场有关。你现在明白心理状态存在于电性实相中，因此某些心境会在电场中被复制出来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: It is also beneficial to dip into those areas with no purpose in mind, for here whatever necessary information that you require without your conscious knowledge can be made available. When you learn to explore this region you can use it as a launching pad for other activities. In so doing you leave your physical body in good hands.
quotes.translation: 不带任何目的潜入那些领域也很有益，因为在那里，你意识层面未察觉却必需的信息都能被获取。当你学会探索这个区域，就能将其作为其他活动的跳板。这样做时，你的物质身体会得到妥善照料。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Two men for example, of precisely the same physical age, of precisely the same physical condition, will be in completely different states of mind, of competence, of effectiveness and of strength, as a direct result of their inner beliefs as to their relative freedom within the framework of the physical system in which they exist.
quotes.translation: 举例来说，两个生理年龄完全相同、身体状况完全一致的人，会因各自对物质系统框架内相对自由度的内在信念，而呈现出截然不同的心境、能力、效能与力量状态。

quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Both occasions panicked you. (Pause.) During one your mind was extremely passive. You were sitting down. I see you bent over a table, either reading or drawing, in the front upstairs room.
quotes.translation: 两次经历都让你惊慌失措。（停顿）其中一次你的心智极度被动。当时你正坐着，我看到你俯身在桌前——要么在阅读要么在绘画——就在前楼的上层房间。

quotes.text: Now I can tell you what to do, and I can assure you that this works. It is up to you to follow through however. Now in your mind you now have the image of yourself with hampered motion, stiff joints. You have the fears that this image can evoke, and you must be very on guard against projecting this idea or image into the future.
quotes.translation: 现在我可以告诉你该怎么做，并且保证这个方法有效。但最终执行与否取决于你。此刻你的心智中存有行动受限、关节僵硬的自我意象，以及这个意象可能引发的恐惧。你必须非常警惕，不要将这个观念或意象投射到未来。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: When these realignments are always made from the outside, the body's innate coherence becomes jeopardized, and its intimate relationship with mind confused. More, its natural healing powers are dulled. The built-in initiating triggers of reactions that are meant to follow inner stimuli are activated instead by "exterior" means.
quotes.translation: 当这些重整总是来自外部时，身体固有的协调性就会受损，它与心智的亲密关系也会变得混乱。更严重的是，其自然疗愈能力会变得迟钝。那些本应跟随内在刺激而启动的内在触发机制，反而被"外在"手段所激活。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The daughter of the present personality, however, was once a sister. There were difficulties between the sisters. Now this relationship is one that irons out old difficulties. The youngest son was once the personality's father. Is it any wonder that the conscious mind does not retain in one life memory of its other existences?
quotes.translation: 然而，当前人格的女儿曾是她的姐妹。姐妹之间存在过矛盾。如今这段关系正在化解旧日的纠葛。最小的儿子曾是人格的父亲。难怪意识心无法在单一生世中保留对其他存有的记忆？
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: We may organize our material for a while now around one or another of these projects, though in the past months, on a rather free-flowing basis you have received excellent material; and regardless of the organization or order of delivery, the material has its own form, and what I have in mind to say will be said. (Humorously.)
quotes.translation: 接下来一段时间，我们或许会围绕这些课题之一来组织材料——尽管过去几个月里，你们已以相当自由流动的方式获得了极佳的材料；无论传递的组织方式或顺序如何，材料自有其形态，而我想说的内容终将被道出。（带着幽默感。）

quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: My memory does not include a predetermined past in which Ruburt exists. He can do things that did not happen in my memory of that existence, and did not, in fact, occur. Now that is a "mind-blowing" statement, and it applies to each of you. It is important in terms of your own understanding of yourself and the nature of time.
quotes.translation: 我的记忆并不包含一个预设的过去，其中鲁柏已然存在。他能做出在我对那存有的记忆中未曾发生、事实上也从未发生过的事。这正是一句"令人震撼"的陈述，且适用于你们每个人。就你们对自身及时间本质的理解而言，这点至关重要。

quotes.text: While it does appear spontaneously, a good deal of conditioning and expectation is behind it, and your subconscious mind brings it forth. A somewhat similar loss of the props can also be achieved by partial immersion in an idea with which you are already familiar, as a stepping stone; and this is really what contemplation is.
quotes.translation: 尽管它看似自发呈现，背后却存在大量制约与预期，并由你的潜意识心将其引出。通过部分沉浸于你已熟悉的某个理念（作为踏脚石），也能达到某种类似的"支撑物消失"状态——这其实正是沉思的本质。

quotes.text: This form is the electric symbol. It is received by the brain and changed into a more or less pure psychological symbol. Or in case, in the case, of a dream, it is changed into a dream symbol. The dream as perceived by the mind then, is a pattern of electrical impulses, all more or less within a particular range of intensity.
quotes.translation: 这种形态是电性符号。它被大脑接收后转化为或多或少纯粹的心理符号。或者，在梦境的情况下，它被转化为梦的象征。因此，被心所感知的梦境，是一系列电性脉冲的图样，其强度大致处于特定范围内。

quotes.text: It has often been said that the subconscious has a generalized focus, but the subconscious and inner senses have as strong and vital and intensified a focus as the focus of the conscious mind. The phenomena perceived is merely of a different nature, and in this state of which I have spoken no real intensification is possible.
quotes.translation: 常有人说潜意识具有泛化的焦点，但潜意识与内在感官拥有与意识心同样强烈、鲜活且集中的焦点。所感知的现象仅仅是性质不同而已，而在我提及的这种状态中，真正的强化是不可能发生的。

quotes.text: The idleness, if prolonged, is not idleness. Concentration upon physical data takes the conscious mind off for a trip, and it gives the inner self greater freedom to initiate new developments and intuitional creations. These, incidentally, can help you understand the true nature of time. Now take your break. (10:17 to 10:31.)
quotes.translation: 若持续放空，便不再是放空。专注于物质资料让意识心去旅行，赋予内在自体更大自由以启动新发展与直觉性创造。这些创造，顺带能助你理解时间的真实本质。现在休息片刻。（10:17至10:31）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now: Dictation. (With many pauses:) When I speak of the dream world, I am not referring to some imaginary realm, but to the kind of world of ideas, of thoughts, of mental actions, out of which all form as you think of it emerges. In actuality this is an inner universe rather than an inner world. Your physical reality is but one materialization of that inner organization. All possible civilizations exist first in that realm of inner mind.
quotes.translation: 现在：口授。（多次停顿）当我谈及梦境世界时，并非指某个虚幻领域，而是指思想、念头、心智活动构成的世界——你所认知的一切形态皆由此涌现。实际上这是内在宇宙而非内在世界。你们的物质实相仅是那内在组织的一种物质化呈现。所有可能的文明首先存在于那内在心智领域。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Ruburt wants to know where the words are coming from. He still wants to know if I am part of his subconscious--and I must admit I do find such an idea appalling--and he wants his answers given to him in a manner which his conscious mind can understand. This is our 24th session, and I am still trying to give you the answers.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏想知道这些话语从何而来。他仍想知道我是否属于他潜意识的一部分——我必须承认这想法令我惊骇——他要求答案能以意识心理解的方式呈现。这是我们的第24节课，我仍在尝试给予你们答案。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The fluctuations mentioned earlier are often quite minute, yet highly significant. The conscious mind knows well of its own fluctuating state. When once it is led to face this, it finds not chaos, or worse, nonexistence, but the source of its own abilities and strength. The personality then begins to use its own potential.
quotes.translation: 先前提及的波动往往极其细微，却意义重大。意识心深知自身的波动状态。当它被引导直面此事实时，发现的并非混沌或更糟的虚无，而是自身能力与力量的源头。人格于是开始运用自身潜能。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: It will manage to work around the blind spots in the reasoning mind, for example. Often it will sift out from the barrage of conflicting beliefs the particular set that is the most life-giving, and send these forth in what then appears as a burst of revelation. Such revelations result in new patterns that change behavior.
quotes.translation: 举例而言，它会设法绕过理性思维的盲点。常能从相互矛盾的信念洪流中筛选出最具生命力的特定组合，以启示迸发的方式释放。此类启示催生改变行为的新模式。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The conscious mind as you normally think of it directs your overall action, and its ideas determine the kind of selectivity you use. It is for this reason that I am trying to expand your conscious ideas, so that you become better equipped to choose your line of physical experience from all those probable ones open to you.
quotes.translation: 你们通常认知的意识心主导整体行动，其观念决定你运用的选择性。正因如此，我试图拓展你们的意识观念，使你们能更妥善地从所有可能的实相中，选择属于自己的物质经验路径。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 685

quotes.text: The prime factor of course is the individual's ability to avail himself of energy, and then to utilize it effectively. Coordination and communication between the inner and outer ego is also a strong factor here. You must also keep in mind that the individual creates his own environment through his successive incarnations.
quotes.translation: 首要因素当然是个人运用能量并有效利用它的能力。内外自我之间的协调与沟通在此也是重要因素。你还必须牢记，个人通过其连续转世创造自身环境。

quotes.text: But when the conscious mind is forced to face far less pleasant encounters, and is robbed of its power to reason at the same time, then you do indeed insult the basis of its being.
quotes.translation: 但当显意识被迫面对远非愉快的遭遇，同时被剥夺了推理能力时，你确实在侮辱其存在的基础。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I can, it is true, focus exclusively upon the present individual. This merely involves a change of focus on my part, and a narrowing of focus and concentration. There is much more that can be said here, but we shall save it for another occasion. The matter was in your mind, and I am giving you a simple and direct answer.
quotes.translation: 诚然，我可以完全聚焦于当下的个体。这仅涉及我自身焦点的转换，以及注意力的收窄与集中。此处本可详述更多，但我们留待他日再谈。此事原在你心中，我正给予你简单直接的答复。

quotes.text: The great natural cooperation that exists between the waking and the dreaming self has been mostly set aside. The conscious mind is quite equipped to interpret dream information.
quotes.translation: 清醒自我与做梦自我之间存在的伟大自然协作大多已被搁置。显意识完全具备解读梦境信息的能力。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2

This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: I also have the impression of a competitor. Now I am not sure here. This is a strong competitor without your company, or it is a strong physical competitor of yours within the same company. There seems to be a D here--the name of David comes to mind, and the Star of Israel, which may mean that the competitor is Jewish.
quotes.translation: 我还感受到一个竞争者的存在。此处我不甚确定。这是你公司外部的一个强劲对手，或是同一公司内与你竞争的实力派人物。似乎有个D字——大卫之名浮现脑海，还有以色列之星，这可能意味着该竞争者是犹太人。

quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You can intellectually understand what I am telling you, but the brain （shaking head） cannot experience reality directly. This experience must come from the mind, through use of the inner senses. I want it understood that camouflage physical reality is indeed a reality, even while it is a distortion of something else.
quotes.translation: 你可以在理智上理解我所说的话，但大脑（摇头）无法直接体验实相。这种体验必须经由心灵，通过运用内在感官获得。我希望你们明白，伪装物质实相确实是实相，即使它是对其他事物的扭曲。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Now this is a split of the conscious mind. It does not originate within the inner self. When Augustus Two takes over he is quite conscious. He simply views physical reality through an undeviating system of beliefs. The messages sent to the body are not in the least contradictory. The body is under excellent control.
quotes.translation: 现在这是意识心的一种分裂。它并非源自内在自体。当奥古斯都二世接管时，他完全清醒。他只是透过一套坚定不移的信念系统来审视物质实相。传递给身体的讯息毫无矛盾之处。身体处于极佳的控制之下。

quotes.text: Now, in physical terms it may take some time before your conscious mind accepts or recognizes a diagnosis given in a dream. It may come to you later in altered form as a hunch or sudden intuition, or an urge for action. If you do not trust yourself you may ignore such impetuses and not take advantage of the answers.
quotes.translation: 以物质层面而言，你的意识心可能需要一段时间才能接受或认出梦境中给出的诊断。它可能稍后以预感、突发的直觉或行动的冲动等变形形式来到你面前。如果你不信任自己，可能会忽略这些驱动力，从而错失这些答案。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Now, I could continue along these lines for quite some time, and I am perfectly willing to do so, for your edification rather than my own. If you prefer that we do this while it is fresh in our minds, then take a break and we shall continue. And if not, do not ask me leading questions, and we shall end the session.
quotes.translation: 现在，我可以沿着这些思路继续讲相当长的时间，而且我非常乐意这样做，是为了你们的启迪而非我自己的。如果你们希望趁我们记忆犹新时进行，那就休息一下，我们继续。如果不想，就不要问我诱导性问题，我们结束这节课。

quotes.text: If you recall, part of your mind was conscious, you were capable of normal conversation. Another part of your psyche was completely dissociated and waiting for your command.
quotes.translation: 如果你记得，你的一部分心智是清醒的，能够进行正常对话。你心灵的另一部分则完全分离，等待你的指令。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: Within the basic framework of the body chosen before physical birth (for reasons that will be discussed later), the individual has full freedom to create a perfectly healthy functioning form. The form is, however, a mirror of beliefs, and will accurately materialize in flesh those ideas held by the conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 在物质出生前所选择的身体基本架构内（原因将在后面讨论），个体拥有完全的自由去创造一个完全健康运作的形态。然而，形态是信念的镜子，会准确地将意识心所持的观念物质化为血肉之躯。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: This alone will cause adverse experience, making you reject the very basis of your own framework of experience. You will consider the body as a thing, a fine vehicle but not in itself the natural living expression of your being in material form. Many such Eastern schools also stress -- as do numerous spiritualistic schools -- the importance of the "unconscious levels of the self," and teach you to mistrust the conscious mind.
quotes.translation: 仅此一点就会导致负面经验，使你拒绝自身经验架构的根本基础。你会将身体视为一件物品、一个良好的载具，而非你存有在物质形式中自然的活生生表达。许多这类东方学派——如同众多通灵学派——也强调"自我无意识层面"的重要性，并教导你不信任意识心。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Because Ruburt deals in words it is easy for me to communicate in this manner. That is, Ruburt automatically translates inner data given by me into coherent, valid and faithful camouflage patterns, into words. The data that I give is not actually sound on my part. The transference of my data is automatic and instantaneous on Ruburt's part and is performed through the inner workings of the mind, the inner senses and the brain.
quotes.translation: 因为鲁柏处理文字，所以我很容易以这种方式沟通。也就是说，鲁柏会自动将我提供的内在资料，转译为连贯、有效且忠实的伪装模式，即文字。我提供的资料实际上并非声音形式。鲁柏对我的资料的转译是自动且即时的，通过心智的内在运作、内在感官和大脑完成。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The great value of the conscious mind lies precisely in its ability to make decisions and set directions. Its role is dual, however: It is meant to assess conditions both inside and outside, to handle data that comes from the physical world and from the inner portions of the self. It is not a closed system, then.
quotes.translation: 意识心智的巨大价值恰恰在于它能够做出决定并设定方向。然而，它的角色是双重的：它旨在评估内外状况，处理来自物质世界和内在自我的资料。因此，它不是一个封闭的系统。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: I am sorry that your tree has vanished, yet we all know that the tree has not really vanished. And I hope that you will use your inner senses to create the tree in your mind for the painting that you have begun. Now it will be a better tree in the painting, for you will be able to create the essence of the tree.
quotes.translation: 我很遗憾你的树消失了，但我们都知道树并没有真正消失。我希望你能运用内在感官，在你心中创造那棵树，用于你已开始的那幅画。现在画中的树会更好，因为你能创造出树的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Perhaps a connection with a charity and this affair. In any case funds from it do not go for profit. The affair is one that is held yearly, I believe--at least in the minds of those who attend there is the memory of previous such affairs, held for the same purpose, and approximately at the same time of the year.
quotes.translation: 也许与某个慈善机构有关联，且涉及此事。无论如何，其资金并非用于盈利。我相信，这是一年一度的活动——至少在参与者的心中，存有以往类似活动的记忆，这些活动出于相同目的，大约在每年同一时间举行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)

quotes.text: Direct experience alone will bring you such knowledge, and yet it will not be held by the conscious mind or by the ego, although flashes of the experience may be momentarily projected within these realms. Such knowledge indeed is communicated to the various levels of the self through dreams, as you should know.
quotes.translation: 只有直接体验才能带给你这样的知识，然而它不会被意识心智或自我所持有，尽管体验的闪光可能暂时投射到这些领域。正如你所知，这样的知识确实通过梦境传达给自我的各个层面。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)

quotes.text: A A is a friend of Ruburt's student, Venice. It is Alexander Anare (the "e" is silent), who died in 1906 and was a friend of her family. He was indeed a lawyer, but also was involved in psychic studies with a group in Cleveland called the Brothers of the Fourth Order, and he is particularly interested in the manipulation of physical matter. He had a scientific turn of mind and will, I believe, help you in your experiments.
quotes.translation: A A是鲁柏的学生威尼斯的朋友。他是亚历山大·阿纳尔（"e"不发音），于1906年去世，是她家的朋友。他确实是一名律师，但也参与了克利夫兰一个名为“第四阶兄弟会”的团体的灵性研究，并且他对操控物质特别感兴趣。他具有科学倾向的心智，我相信他会帮助你的实验。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: The body and mind together do present a united, self regulating, healing, self-clearing system. Within it each problem contains its own solution if it is honestly faced. Each symptom, mental or physical, is a clue to the resolution of the conflict behind it, and contains within it the seeds of its own healing.
quotes.translation: 身体与心灵共同呈现出一个统一、自我调节、疗愈且自我净化的系统。在其中，每个问题若被诚实面对，便包含其自身的解决方案。每个症状，无论是心理还是生理的，都是其背后冲突的解决线索，并内蕴自我疗愈的种子。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is a period of great activity, telepathic communication, an overcrowding physically, but forces great new developments and a new synthesis, and this is your present situation. (Humorously:) It is not difficult for neighbors to understand each other when they live 50 miles apart. When you become overcrowded in severe circumstances, you must learn to understand your neighbor or lose Your mind. You are forced to relate.
quotes.translation: 这是一个充满巨大活动、心灵感应沟通、物理空间过度拥挤的时期，但它迫使产生伟大的新发展与新的综合，而这就是你们当前的处境。（幽默地：）当邻居相隔五十英里时，彼此理解并不困难。当你们在严峻环境中变得过度拥挤时，就必须学会理解你的邻居，否则就会失去你的心智。你们被迫建立关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)

quotes.text: There, is also a loose correspondence in the ways (underlined) that you use your cellular structure and utilize energy. He is working from the medical principles you see. This is a very loose analogy, but he is hoping to shoot himself toward you like an arrow, hoping that those correspondences that he suspects will help draw him to you. He has made some errors, and your receptive state of mind will give him more leeway.
quotes.translation: 在你们运用细胞结构及利用能量的方式（强调）上，也存在一种松散的对应关系。他是从你们所见的医学原理出发的。这是一个非常粗略的类比，但他希望像一支箭般射向你们，期望他怀疑的那些对应关系能帮助他接近你们。他犯了一些错误，而你们接纳的心境将给予他更多余地。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The natural healing of sound can happen also when you do such a simple thing as listen to the rain. You do not need drugs, hypnotism, or even meditation. You only need to allow and direct the freedom of your conscious mind. Left alone, it will flow through thoughts and images that provide their own therapy.
quotes.translation: 当你做诸如聆听雨声这般简单的事情时，声音的自然疗愈也能发生。你不需要药物、催眠，甚至不需要冥想。你只需允许并引导你意识心智的自由。当它被独自留下时，它会流过那些提供自身疗愈的思想与意象。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: When an individual becomes older -- and retired, for example -- the focus for that particular kind of concentration is no longer so immediately available. The mind actually becomes more itself, freer to use more of its abilities, allowed to stray from restricted areas, to assimilate, acknowledge and create.
quotes.translation: 当一个人变老——例如退休——那种特定专注的焦点便不再那么直接可得。心智实际上变得更像它自己，更自由地运用更多能力，被允许偏离受限区域，去同化、承认并创造。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Our dreams therefore occupy the same space as is occupied by the mind--no space at all. There still must be a connection with the physical organism, and here our chemical and electrical components enter in. Each dream is actually built up through a chemical synthesis that follows strong electrical pathways.
quotes.translation: 因此，我们的梦境占据与心智相同的空间——根本没有任何空间。但仍必须与生理有机体建立连接，而在此我们的化学与电性成分介入其中。每个梦实际上是通过遵循强烈电性路径的化学合成而构建起来的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)

quotes.text: There are no presents or pasts to these minds, only simultaneous experience, and a creativity that constantly of itself and its existence creates more. Consciousness of itself forms all of these realities and systems. It does not forget as you forget, that you form all the dimensions within your own system.
quotes.translation: 这些心灵没有现在或过去，只有同时性的体验，以及一种不断从自身及其存在中创造更多事物的创造力。意识本身形成了所有这些实相与体系。它不会像你遗忘那样，忘记你正在形成自己系统内的所有维度。

quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Many individuals are completely blind to their own beliefs about themselves, and the nature of reality. Your own conscious thoughts will give you excellent clues. Often you will find yourself refusing to accept certain thoughts that come to your mind because they conflict with other usually accepted ideas.
quotes.translation: 许多人对自身信念以及实相的本质完全视而不见。你自身的意识思想会提供绝佳的线索。你常会发现，自己拒绝接受某些浮现脑海的想法，因为它们与其他通常被接纳的观念相冲突。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: In this section, therefore, I have outlined various experiments or exercises for the reader. These will certainly lead you to form your own versions of the exercises given, or will open your mind so that spontaneously, in your own way, you become aware of events that were literally invisible to you before.
quotes.translation: 因此，在本节中，我为读者概述了各种实验或练习。这些练习无疑会引导你形成自己版本的练习方式，或开启你的心智，使你自发地以自身方式觉察到先前完全不可见的事件。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 725
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It makes no difference you see whether you are awake in your terms or asleep in your terms; if your conscious mind is functioning in either state, you will see him.
quotes.translation: 你看，无论你处于清醒状态还是睡眠状态，这都无关紧要；只要你的意识心智在这两种状态中运作，你就能看见他。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Now, some of those children went on to become great musicians, while others lost their abilities along the way, so what are we dealing with in such cases? We are dealing with direct knowing. We are dealing with the natural perceptions of the psyche, at least when we are speaking in human terms. We are dealing with natural, direct cognition as it exists before and after (pause) man's experience with the reasoning mind.
quotes.translation: 现在，这些孩子中有些后来成为伟大的音乐家，而另一些则中途丧失了能力。那么，我们在处理这类情况时究竟面对什么？我们面对的是直接认知。我们面对的是心灵的自然感知——至少在以人类术语讨论时如此。我们面对的是在人类运用推理心智之前与之后（停顿）存在的自然直接认知。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-07-10-07Dreams, _Evolution,_ and Value_One - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: (From the 54th session for May 18, 1964:) Your Ruburt was, indeed, Seth ... I have promised to give you more material dealing with the psychic construction of the entity, and its relationship with its various [physical] personalities. In the beginning, I could not tell you in so many words that Ruburt is myself, because you would have leaped to the conclusion that I was Ruburt's subconscious mind, and this is not so.
quotes.translation: （摘自1964年5月18日第54节课：）你的鲁柏确实就是赛斯……我曾承诺提供更多关于存有心灵结构及其与各个[物质]人格关系的资料。起初，我无法直截了当地告诉你鲁柏就是我本人，因为你可能会草率地得出结论，认为我是鲁柏的潜意识心智——事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: You may occasionally employ the association of ideas, one thought leading easily to another. When you do this you often perceive new insights. As the events fall apart from time continuity in your mind they seem to take on fresh vitality. You have unstructured them, you see, from the usual organization.
quotes.translation: 你偶尔可以运用意念联想，让一个想法自然引导至另一个。当你这样做时，常能洞察到新的见解。当事件在心灵中脱离时间连续性时，它们似乎焕发出崭新的活力。你看，你已将它们从惯常的组织结构中解构出来。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: A physical storm may, as you know, be far more disastrous than an emotional one. But a physical storm is a collective endeavor, and can be compared, if it is disastrous, only with disastrous collective emotional storms such as those that sweep across nations, when all minds seem seized by irrationality.
quotes.translation: 如你所知，一场物理风暴可能远比情绪风暴更具破坏性。但物理风暴是集体性的努力，若要论其灾难性，唯有席卷国家的那种集体性情绪风暴——当所有心灵似乎都被非理性攫住时——才堪与之相比。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: I would appreciate it, dear friend, if you let me continue for now, though I understand why you want to know. This is not a rebuke. (Smiling.) I simply did not want to be interrupted. Give us a moment. (Pause.) I do not know the specific painting, although a round object was involved. It was I believe one of the pieces of fruit. The idea flitted through your mind and you did not grab hold of it, but it worried you.
quotes.translation: 亲爱的朋友，我感谢你此刻让我继续讲述，尽管我理解你为何急于知晓。这并非责备。（微笑）我只是不想被打断。请稍候片刻。（停顿）我不清楚那幅具体画作，但其中涉及一个圆形物体。我相信那是某件水果。这个念头曾掠过你的心灵，你未能抓住它，但它令你困扰。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: I mentioned (in the 619th session) a game in which you playfully adopt an idea that you want to materialize, then imagine it happening in your mind. Know that all events are mental and psychic first and that these will happen in physical terms, but do not keep watching yourself. Continue with the game.
quotes.translation: 我曾（在第619节中）提及一个游戏：你以游戏心态采纳一个想要具现化的想法，然后在心灵中想象它正在发生。要知道所有事件首先都是心智与心灵的，这些终将在物质层面显化，但不要持续监视自己。继续这个游戏。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: When a clairvoyant event is perceived the data is received by the mind and given to the brain, which then interprets it as it does usual data. The physical body becomes aware of it in other words, but the senses have been bypassed.
quotes.translation: 当感知到千里眼事件时，数据被心灵接收并传递给大脑，大脑随后像处理常规数据那样解读它。换言之，物质身体会意识到它，但感官已被绕过。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: In the same way you also carry within you structures not yet fully used; those organizations point -- in your terms now -- toward future evolution. Use of the spacious mind involves these. Individuals through all the ages have experienced this other kind of awareness, though never to its fullest form.
quotes.translation: 同样地，你内在也携带着尚未完全使用的结构；这些组织——以你们现在的说法——指向未来的进化。对广袤心灵的运用涉及这些结构。古往今来，个体都曾体验过这种另类的觉知，尽管从未达到其最完整的形态。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: It is beneficial for us to have these particular witnesses, and it is good experience for you. I understand quite well the necessary limitations that we have to work with. You have the opportunity to ask me any particular questions you have in mind, Joseph, or we may end the session as you may prefer.
quotes.translation: 拥有这些特定的见证者对我们有益，这对你也是很好的经验。我非常清楚我们必须应对的必要限制。约瑟，你有机会提出任何你心中特定的问题，或者我们可以按你的意愿结束这节课程。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: The consciousness of atoms and molecules can be likened to the subconscious as you now know it, in that it is generalized to a large degree, but energy-propelled. You should perhaps realize by now that the inner self, the mind and its components, is composed or forms a unitary force field of its own.
quotes.translation: 原子和分子的意识可以比作你目前所知的潜意识，因为它很大程度上是概括性的，但由能量驱动。你现在或许应该意识到，内在自体、心智及其组成部分，构成或形成了它自己的统一力场。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: If these are blocked in the same manner also, then the entire mind-body relationship becomes alienated from itself. The inner mechanics are disturbed. The basic challenge not only is not faced, but is constantly denied the physical expression that, left alone, would bring about its natural solution.
quotes.translation: 如果这些也以同样的方式被阻塞，那么整个心智-身体关系就会与自身疏离。内在机制受到干扰。基本挑战不仅未被面对，而且不断被剥夺了本可自然带来解决之道的物质表达。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Twins use communication of the inner senses all unknowing, and what Loriza read of the material moved her subconscious to intuitive realization. The communication between twins is freer than it is with others. Twins are more used to using inner communication, and instances come more easily to mind.
quotes.translation: 双胞胎在不知不觉中使用内在感官的沟通，洛莉莎所读到的材料触动了她的潜意识，使其获得直觉性的领悟。双胞胎之间的沟通比与他人更为自由。双胞胎更习惯于使用内在沟通，相关实例也更容易浮现于心中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: There are purposes not nearly as easy to describe, however, intents of a psychological nature, yearnings toward satisfactions not so easily categorized. Man experiences ambitions, desires, likes and dislikes of a highly emotional nature -- and at the same time he has intellectual beliefs about himself, his feelings, and the world. These are the result of training, for you use your mind as you have been taught.
quotes.translation: 然而，有些目的并不那么容易描述——那些心理性质的意图，对难以归类之满足的渴望。人类体验着高度情绪化的抱负、欲望、好恶——同时，他对自己、自己的感受以及世界持有理智上的信念。这些是训练的结果，因为你按照所受的教导来运用你的心智。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events
quotes.source_file: 10-06-10-06The Individual and the Nature o - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title:
SESSION 833, JANUARY 31, 1979
9:21 P.M. WEDNESDAY
source_raw.chapter_title: Chapter 10: The Good, the Better, and the Best. Value Fulfillment Versus Competition

quotes.text: Alternate focus is merely a state in which you turn your consciousness in other than its habitual direction, in order to perceive quite legitimate realities that exist simultaneously with your own. You must alter your perception to perceive any reality that is not geared practically toward material form. This is something like looking out of the corner of your eye or mind, rather than straight ahead. (Pause.)
quotes.translation: 交替焦点只是一种状态，你在此状态中将意识转向其惯常方向之外，以便感知与你自身现实同时存在的、完全真实的实相。你必须改变你的感知，才能感知任何并非实际朝向物质形态的实相。这有点像用眼角或心智的余光来看，而不是直视前方。（停顿）
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Good evening to our friend. Now, to our fine young lady: you must watch the pictures that you paint with your imagination, for you allow your imagination too full a reign. If you read our early material, you will see that your environment and the conditions of your life at any given time are the direct result of your own expectations. You form physical materiaizationls of these realities within your own mind.
quotes.translation: 晚安，我们的朋友。现在，对我们这位优秀的年轻女士说：你必须留意你用想象力描绘的画面，因为你让想象力过于放纵。如果你读过我们早期的资料，就会明白在任何特定时刻，你的环境和生活状况都是你自身期望的直接结果。你在自己的心智中形成了这些实相的物质化形态。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: This is difficult to put into words. Feel toward us rather than think at us, and let us see how we do. Self-suggestion may be most beneficial when possible, when used to put you in this more intuitive frame of mind. Turn your emotions towards us, and I think we'll be able to pick up your objects.
quotes.translation: 这很难用言语表达。请用感受而非思考来面对我们，让我们看看效果如何。在可能的情况下，自我暗示若能让你进入这种更直觉的心境，将最为有益。将你的情感转向我们，我想我们就能接收到你的目标。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: Now even in the case of hallucinations, the originator uses projections from his own physical structure, which he then perceives. Though the mind, or brain rather, may be seemingly passive in the case of the perceiver, the metabolism is quickened, for the body is using energy at a quickened rate.
quotes.translation: 即使在幻觉的情况下，创造者也会运用自身肉体结构的投射，然后感知到这些投射。虽然心智（或更确切地说，大脑）在感知者的情况下可能看似被动，但新陈代谢会加快，因为身体正在以更快的速率消耗能量。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: It cuts you off from the spontaneous give-and-take of conscious and unconscious material mentioned earlier (in this session), and of itself you see necessitates certain changes that then make your prolonged sleep period necessary (intently). The body is denied the frequent rests it requires. Conscious stimuli is over-applied, making assimilation difficult and placing a strain upon the mind-body relationship.
quotes.translation: 这切断了你与先前（在本节中）提到的意识与无意识材料之间自发的交流互动，并且本身必然导致某些改变，进而使你需要更长时间的睡眠（专注地）。身体被剥夺了所需的频繁休息。意识刺激被过度施加，使同化变得困难，并对心智与身体的关系造成压力。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Your subsequent behavior however does not follow his pattern at all. You are quite free for example in your relationship with our friend Aerofranz (Tam Mossman), and you were with (Gene) Bernard, and more than fair with Instream. So this pattern should not be applied in your minds and projected.
quotes.translation: 然而，你随后的行为完全不符合他的模式。例如，你与我们的朋友艾罗弗朗兹（塔姆·莫斯曼）的关系相当自由，与（吉恩）伯纳德相处时也是如此，对因斯特里姆也相当公平。因此，这种模式不应被套用在你们的心智中并投射出去。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: This is on the most surface level, however. A true healing, or health profession, would deal intimately with the powers of the psyche in healing the body, and with the interrelationship among the desires, beliefs, and activities of the conscious mind and its effects upon the cellular behavior.
quotes.translation: 然而，这只是最表面的层面。真正的疗愈或健康专业，会深入处理心灵在疗愈身体方面的力量，以及意识心智的欲望、信念和活动之间的相互关系，及其对细胞行为的影响。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Because Ruburt deals in words [as a writer], it is easy for me to communicate in this manner. That is, he automatically translates inner data given by me into coherent, valid, and faithful camouflage5 patterns -- into words. My information is not actually given as sound. Its transference is instantaneous on Ruburt's part, and is performed through the workings of the mind, the inner senses,6 and the brain.
quotes.translation: 由于鲁柏以文字为业（作为作家），我很容易以这种方式沟通。也就是说，他自动将我给予的内在资料转化为连贯、有效且忠实的伪装模式——转化为文字。我的信息实际上并非以声音形式给出。其传递在鲁柏这一方是瞬间完成的，并通过心智、内在感官和大脑的运作来实现。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: (However, from Session 14 [for January 8, 1964], there's other material that can be given here, as well as some that makes an interesting note at the end of this appendix.4 First, from my own note at 11:05: "Jane said that Seth was quite pleased with the new voice, and that she now knows what he's thinking sometimes, even though he doesn't relay it to or through her as part of a message."
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: The deeper explanations, however, demand a further expansion of ideas of consciousness, and a certain reorientation. It is extremely important that you bear in mind the importance of free will, and the presence of your own identity as you think of it. With that preamble, let me continue then.
quotes.translation: 然而，更深入的解释需要对意识观念进行进一步扩展，并需要某种程度的重新定向。极其重要的是，你们要牢记自由意志的重要性，以及你们所认知的自身身份的存在。有了这个开场白，让我继续往下说。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 1
quotes.source_file: 10-03-10-03The _Unknown_ Reality_ V_O - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 681
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: The Private Probable Man, The Private Probable Woman, The Species in Probabilities, And Blueprints for Realities

quotes.text: Certain chemicals may affect dreaming by altering the cells' reality. Many sleeping pills are detrimental, in that they inhibit the body's natural response to its environment while an individual is sleeping, and deaden the intimate relationship between the dreaming mind and the sleeping body.
quotes.translation: 某些化学物质可能通过改变细胞的实相来影响做梦。许多安眠药是有害的，因为它们抑制了身体在个体睡眠时对环境做出的自然反应，并削弱了做梦心智与睡眠身体之间的亲密关系。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: You are used to thinking in terms of heredity. In physical terms, and in a different way than you imagine, this is important. Certain earth experiences however are dependent upon duration in time, and result as a consequence of the mind playing upon its experience through long earth seasons.
quotes.translation: 你们习惯于从遗传的角度思考。在物质层面，这以一种不同于你们想象的方式具有重要意义。然而，某些地球体验依赖于时间中的持续，并且是心智通过漫长的地球季节在其经验上运作的结果。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: You must realize that your conscious mind is competent, its ideas pertinent, and that your own beliefs affect and form your body and your experience.
quotes.translation: 你们必须认识到，你们的意识心智是称职的，其观念是切题的，并且你们自己的信念会影响并塑造你们的身体和你们的经验。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The boundaries are functional units rather, and functions may blend one into the other. For practical purposes there are apparent divisions. In basic actuality there are no such divisions. This will be dealt with very thoroughly at a later date, but it is an important point to keep in mind.
quotes.translation: 边界其实是功能性的单元，而功能可能相互融合。出于实用目的，存在明显的划分。但在基本实相中，并不存在这样的划分。这一点将在日后非常详尽地讨论，但这是一个需要牢记的重要观点。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: I affect reality, physical reality, because men's minds are changed according to their ideas, and we shall change these ideas for the better. The ideas, working through men, will affect physical reality for the better. I am here more often than you think. Never, however, in a prying manner.
quotes.translation: 我影响实相，物质实相，因为人们的心智会随着他们的观念而改变，而我们将把这些观念变得更好。这些观念通过人类运作，将改善物质实相。我在这里的次数比你以为的要多得多。然而，我从不以窥探的方式出现。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Our instructions will begin with the use of these dreams whenever they occur. You will know them by their intense vividness. These are dreams when at first you are certain that you are awake. It is sufficient to keep this in mind, so that in the middle of a dream you can realize what it is.
quotes.translation: 我们的指导将从这些梦发生时开始运用它们。你会通过它们极其鲜明的生动性认出它们。这些梦起初会让你确信自己是清醒的。只要记住这一点就足够了，这样在梦中你就能意识到它是什么。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 6 of The Seth Material (Sessions 240-280)
quotes.source_file: ES-6-The Early Sessions-Book 6 of The Seth Material(240-280).json

quotes.text: Dictation: As you examine the contents of your conscious mind, it may seem to you that you hold so many different beliefs at different times that you cannot correlate them. They will, however, form into clear patterns. You will find a grouping of core beliefs about which the others gather.
quotes.translation: 口授：当你检视自己意识心（conscious mind）的内容时，你可能会觉得在不同时间持有如此多不同的信念，以至于无法将它们关联起来。然而，它们会形成清晰的模式。你会发现一组核心信念，其他信念都围绕它们聚集。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: The conscious mind exists before material life and after it. In corporeal existence it is intertwined with the brain, and during physical life your earthly perceptions -- your precise and steady focus within your particular space and time system -- are dependent upon that fine alliance.
quotes.translation: 意识心存在于物质生命之前和之后。在肉身存在中，它与大脑交织在一起，而在物质生命期间，你尘世的感知——你在特定时空系统中精确而稳定的焦点——依赖于这种精妙的联盟。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Suppose you have a particular goal in mind as a youngster, toward which you work. Your intent, images, desires and determination form a psychic force that is projected out ahead of you, so to speak. You send the reality of yourself from your present into what you think of as the future.
quotes.translation: 假设你年轻时心中有一个特定的目标，并为之努力。你的意图、意象、渴望和决心形成一种心灵力量，可以说，它被投射到你前方。你将自己实相从当下发送到你认为是未来的地方。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Therefore you accept them for they make senseto the physical mechanism. The inner self has the knowledge behind these physical perceptions. The brain is responsible for these physical symbols. The mind has no need of them, but passes the information to the brain, who then interprets it.
quotes.translation: 因此你接受它们，因为它们对物质机制有意义。内在自体拥有这些物质感知背后的知识。大脑负责这些物质符号。心智不需要它们，而是将信息传递给大脑，然后大脑对其进行解读。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: The dates 325 and 375 come to mind in connection with my own life at that time. Again, the names and dates have little meaning to me now. In that life I learned to understand the interplay between men and their ambitions, the gulf that often exists between ideals and practical action.
quotes.translation: 与我自己当时生活相关的年份325和375浮现于脑海中。同样地，这些名字和年份如今对我已无甚意义。在那次生命中，我学会了理解人类与野心之间的相互作用，以及理想与实际行动之间常存在的鸿沟。
quotes.book: Seth Speaks: The Eternal Validity of the Soul
quotes.source_file: 10-01-10-01Seth Speaks_ The Eternal Validity of the soul - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: One note to Mark. I have mentioned rather strenuously that it is most necessary for him to find his own establishment. The twinges that he feels are indeed warnings, or nudges rather, from his own subconscious mind, that he do this and thus bring the plans for it into actual reality.
quotes.translation: 给马克的提示。我曾相当强烈地提到，他找到自己的立足之地是极为必要的。他所感受到的刺痛，实则是来自他自身潜意识的警告或轻推，促使他这样做，从而将相关计划带入实际现实。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: (Briskly:) Now that is the end of that. I hope that your mind is set somewhat at rest. You may end the session or take a break as you prefer.
quotes.translation: （轻快地：）现在这部分就到此为止。我希望你的心能稍感安定。你可以选择结束课程或休息一下，随你喜好。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Also, Ruburt's conscious mind is quite merry over your portrait award, and if you both are merry then I will join in the general enthusiasm.
quotes.translation: 此外，鲁柏的意识心对你的肖像奖感到相当愉悦，如果你们俩都开心，那我也会加入这普遍的兴奋之中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: Nevertheless the two of you interact, and because Ruburt is strongly intuitional at times he is a help to you. And at other times Ruburt senses your state of mind even before it materializes, and this sends Ruburt into an overanxious state which is not beneficial to either of you.
quotes.translation: 然而，你们两人相互影响，因为鲁柏有时直觉强烈，这对你是一种帮助。而在其他时候，鲁柏甚至在你情绪状态具体化之前就能感知到，这使鲁柏陷入过度焦虑的状态，对你们双方都无益处。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: There are personalities who are naturally equipped to understand if not to flatter, while having at the same time keen minds. These men will flatter your head of state through understanding, and this is important. You will ride with these men if you are true to your own instincts.
quotes.translation: 有些人格天生具备理解的能力，即使不刻意奉承，同时拥有敏锐的心智。这些人会通过理解来奉承你的国家元首，这一点至关重要。如果你忠于自己的直觉，你将与这些人同行。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: The energy is then transformed in the dream universe, and again regenerated and used in the formation of the universe of negative matter, into which it seeps from the dream universe. Our discussions will have to thoroughly discuss the nature of the dream universe before we can hope to consider the universe of negative matter, but it will not hurt if you keep the above mentioned facts in mind.
quotes.translation: 能量随后在梦宇宙中被转化，再次被再生并用于形成负物质宇宙，它从梦宇宙渗入其中。我们的讨论必须彻底探讨梦宇宙的本质，才能考虑负物质宇宙，但如果你将上述事实牢记在心，也不会有害。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: When people using such methods are told that their writing comes through from a demon or the devil, or an evil spirit, then those invisible beliefs are shoved farther away. Any search into the mind becomes frightening and dangerous, since it might lead to further such "invasion."
quotes.translation: 当使用这类方法的人被告知他们的写作来自恶魔、魔鬼或邪灵时，那些无形的信念就被推得更远了。任何对心灵的探索都变得可怕而危险，因为它可能导致进一步的此类“入侵”。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: There are many distortions in the universal mind book that Ruburt reads, and yet overall the ideas presented are highly advantageous. I cannot put this emphatically enough: your beliefs form a psychic climate that in itself attracts and forms the materialization of those beliefs.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏阅读的宇宙心灵之书中有许多扭曲之处，但总体而言，所呈现的理念非常有益。我再怎么强调也不为过：你的信念形成了一种心灵气候，它本身会吸引并形成那些信念的物质化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)
quotes.source_file: ES-8-The Early Sessions-Book 8 of The Seth Material(334-421).json

quotes.text: You may take your break. I realize that I've run on. You are such a beloved friend that I want to help you along these lines as much as possible. Even then it is difficult to keep all aspects in mind, particularly as far as the present personality and its relation to past lives.
quotes.translation: 你可以休息一下。我意识到我说得太多了。你是我如此珍爱的朋友，我想在这些方面尽可能多地帮助你。即便如此，要兼顾所有方面也很困难，尤其是考虑到当前人格及其与过去世的关系。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: He is, in a more basic manner than he may realize, deeply committed here. He is quite content with his ability to affect the minds of others. Our other friend, to the contrary, is afraid of this ability, and distrusts it, and is not at all committed to the product that he sells.
quotes.translation: 他以一种比他意识到的更基本的方式，在这里深深投入。他对自己影响他人心灵的能力相当满意。相反，我们的另一位朋友害怕这种能力，不信任它，并且对他所销售的产品毫无投入。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: A suggestion will be made, not by you or Ruburt, during this conversation, and it will be taken up by others. A plan for a book will evolve, and other plans. There is an H--Helena comes to mind, but it is probable that this Helena is merely connected to one of the women present.
quotes.translation: 在这次对话中，会有一个建议被提出，不是由你或鲁柏，而是由其他人采纳。一本书的计划将会形成，还有其他计划。有一个H——海伦娜浮现在脑海中，但很可能这位海伦娜只是与在场的一位女性有关联。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Any art form touches the generations. Karma can be worked out in many ways, and here again we return to Mark's earlier male oriented, aggressive personality. This time, through the creation of beauty in paintings, he more than makes up for past errors; not only because paintings certainly should possess beauty, but because they instill positive creative thoughts in the mind of the beholder.
quotes.translation: 任何艺术形式都能触动世代。业力可以通过多种方式化解，这里我们再次回到马克早期男性导向、侵略性的人格特质。这次通过绘画创造美，他不仅弥补了过去的错误——不仅因为画作必然蕴含美感，更因这些作品能在观者心中注入积极的创造性思维。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: There is no invasion involved in these sessions, as I have told you often. I have promised to give you more material dealing with the psychic construction of the entity, and its relationship to its fragments. I could not tell you in the beginning in so many words that Ruburt is myself, because you would have leaped to the conclusion that I was Ruburt's subconscious mind, and this is not so.
quotes.translation: 正如我常告诉你们的，这些课程并不存在侵犯性。我曾承诺提供更多关于存有心灵结构及其与分体关系的资料。起初我不能直截了当地告诉你们鲁柏就是我本人，因为你们会立刻断定我是鲁柏的潜意识，但事实并非如此。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The conscious mind had nothing to do with this. He strongly wished for the friend's presence. The wish became reality. You must understand the rules that apply. For they apply whether or not you understand them, and whether or not the wish is one that you really want fulfilled.
quotes.translation: 意识心与此毫无关联。他强烈渴望朋友在场，这个愿望便成为了现实。你们必须理解适用的法则——无论你们是否理解，无论这个愿望是否真是你们想要实现的，这些法则都会生效。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)
quotes.source_file: ES-7-The Early Sessions-Book 7 of The Seth Material(281-333).json

quotes.text: A V comes to mind. Whether this is the person directly involved, or a person causing the difficulty I do not know. Ruburt is so preciously guarding me, and so afraid that what I say may not prove true at all, that he does a beautiful job of blocking me when he gets the chance.
quotes.translation: 有个V字出现在我脑海中。我不知道这是直接相关的人，还是造成困扰的人。鲁柏如此小心翼翼地守护着我，又如此害怕我说的话可能完全不准确，以至于一有机会他就出色地阻断了我的讯息。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: Frederick however could also be reacting to the same sort of event that has not yet occurred, however, to his perception--that is, to an event in the future. For the mind does not divide time into a series of moments. This is done by the physical brain and the physical senses.
quotes.translation: 然而弗雷德里克也可能在回应尚未发生的事件——根据他的感知，这是未来的事件。因为心灵并不将时间分割成连续片段，这是由物质大脑和物质感官完成的。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)
quotes.source_file: ES-5-The Early Sessions-Book 5 of The Seth Material(199-239).json

quotes.text: We ourselves will be concerned for a while with the nature of suggestion in its relationship to action. It should be most beneficial material, practically speaking, and will also add to your knowledge and carry our discussions toward certain directions that I have in mind.
quotes.translation: 我们接下来将探讨暗示与行动的关系本质。从实用角度来说，这应是最有益的资料，不仅能增进你们的认知，还能引导我们的讨论朝向我心中既定的某些方向。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: The range is very large, oftentimes too large, for the conscious mind to perceive a particular segment of it. Clairvoyant material comes constantly. Some of it is used and acted upon. Other portions are discarded simply because the particular information is not pertinent.
quotes.translation: 范围非常广阔，往往过于广阔，以至于意识心无法感知其中的特定片段。千里眼资料持续不断地涌现。其中一部分被运用并付诸行动，其他部分则被舍弃，仅仅因为特定信息并不相关。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: He must avoid a do-or-die attitude. He does best when he allows his mind to wander, and not when he hems it in. In his psychological time experiments lately, he has concentrated with his will, though he did not realize he was doing so. Again, this leads to a constriction.
quotes.translation: 他必须避免孤注一掷的态度。当他允许自己的思绪漫游时，表现最佳，而非将其束缚。最近在心理时间实验中，他虽未意识到，却一直在用意志力集中精神。这再次导致了紧缩。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 4 of The Seth Material (Sessions 149-198)
quotes.source_file: ES-4-The Early Sessions-Book 4 of The Seth Material(149-198).json

quotes.text: Give us a moment ... A stone's physical shadow will faithfully mirror its form. In those terms, little creativity is allowed it. Far greater leeway exists, however, as a thought or feeling in the dream world casts its greater shadow out upon the landscape of the mind.
quotes.translation: 请稍等片刻……石头的物理阴影会忠实地映照其形状。就此而言，它几乎不被允许有任何创造力。然而，在梦境世界中，思想或情感拥有远为广阔的空间，将其更大的阴影投射在心灵的原野上。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 720
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: Ruburt's forgotten-till-now experience with music was legitimate. Actually it reoccurred many times, I believe, and was always discarded by the conscious mind. Again, this involves feeling sound. That is all I will say for the moment, but it is a valuable foretaste.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏那段被遗忘至今的音乐体验是真实的。我相信它实际上多次重现，但总被意识心摒弃。这再次涉及感受声音。此刻我只能说这么多，但这是一次宝贵的预尝。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: You were involved in some cave drawings of animals, and have always been drawn to animals. We will try to get this clearer on another occasion, and you may question me on it. For now, Arpennez (my phonetic interpretation) comes to mind in connection with the caves.
quotes.translation: 你曾参与过一些洞穴动物壁画，并且一直对动物着迷。我们改天会试着把这点说得更清楚，你也可以就此提问。此刻，与洞穴相关的"阿佩内兹"（我的音译）浮现在脑海中。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

source_raw.title: ("I'd like to contact Joseph. ''See the Joseph material in Session 444.)

quotes.text: And so it is from your larger identity that you form the reality that you know. It is up to you to do this with joy and vigor, clearing your conscious mind so that the deeper knowledge of your greater identity can form joyous expressions in the world of the flesh.
quotes.translation: 因此，正是从你更大的身份中，你形成了你所知的实相。你有责任以喜悦和活力做到这一点，清理你的意识心，以便你更大身份的更深层知识能在肉身世界中形成喜悦的表达。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: （A drawing is solidified action. In the process of drawing I am solidifying emotion or feeling. There is distortion present, but still I put down something that my obvious senses can perceive. It is an attempt to get to the heart, the mind's heart, of the matter.
quotes.translation: 绘画是固化的行动。在绘画过程中，我固化了情绪或感受。虽然存在扭曲，但我仍将某种我的显意识感官能感知的东西记录下来。这是试图触及事物的核心——心灵的核心。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)
quotes.source_file: ES-1-The Early Sessions-Book 1 of The Seth Material(1-42).json

quotes.text: In a way, it is meant to familiarize you with elements of your own reality of which you may have been unaware, and to introduce you to certain subjective states of mind that are automatically aroused because of the manner in which the book was produced. Period.
quotes.translation: 从某种角度来说，它旨在让你熟悉自身实相中那些你可能未曾察觉的要素，并引导你进入某些因本书创作方式而自动引发的主观心灵状态。句号。
quotes.book: The Unknown Reality Vol. 2
quotes.source_file: 10-04-10-04The _Unknown_ Reality_ VT - Jane Roberts.json

source_raw.title: SESSION 743
source_raw.chapter_title: Section 3: "The Private Probable Man, the Private Probable Woman, the Species in Probabilities, and Blueprints for Realities" -- Nine sessions devoted to the importance of dreams in the creation of "concrete" events from probable ones. This section also includes discussions on the True Dream-Art Scientist, the True Mental Physicist, and the Complete Physician, as well as material on subatomic particles and the spin of electrons in relationship to perceived reality.

quotes.text: It should certainly be obvious that dreams are not passive events. Some rival physical events in intensity and even effect. They involve quite active coordination on the part of mind and body, and they bring to the individual experience otherwise unattainable.
quotes.translation: 显然，梦绝非被动事件。有些梦在强度甚至效果上可与物理事件匹敌。它们需要心灵与身体的高度协调运作，并为个体带来否则无法获得的体验。
quotes.book: The Nature of the Psyche
quotes.source_file: 10-05-10-05The Nature of the Psyche_ Its H - Jane Roberts.json

quotes.text: Dictation: I am not implying that all social workers are driven by personal problems. On the other hand, it is quite true to say that many such questions turn into challenges with a change of mind, and are then used as impetuses to affect social alterations.
quotes.translation: 口授：我并非暗示所有社会工作者都受个人问题驱使。另一方面，确实可以说，许多此类问题在心态转变后会成为挑战，进而被用作推动社会变革的动力。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: We operate on a cooperative basis, and will continue to do so. I suggest that this material be sent with letters or other portions of the material, to whatever sources you have in mind. I say that I am an energy personality essence, since that is what I am.
quotes.translation: 我们以合作方式运作，并将持续如此。我建议将这份资料连同信件或其他资料片段，寄给你心中想到的任何来源。我说我是能量人格完形，因为这就是我的本质。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)
quotes.source_file: ES-2-The Early Sessions-Book 2 of The Seth Material(43-85).json

quotes.text: The brain, because of its purpose and its close connection to camouflage manipulation, does not have a primary existence within the electrical universe, although it has a secondary existence within it because of its connection to the purely electrical mind.
quotes.translation: 大脑因其目的及其与伪装操控的紧密联系，在电性宇宙中并不具有主要存在，但因其与纯粹电性心灵的关联，它在其中具有次要存在。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 3 of The Seth Material (Sessions 86-148)
quotes.source_file: ES-3-The Early Sessions-Book 3 of The Seth Material(86-148).json

quotes.text: Give your hand full freedom therefore, and it will teach you what you want to know, for it is your way of bringing inner information outward. Then you learn from your own creations, and the physical mind learns by what the hand has done without calculation.
quotes.translation: 因此，请给予你的手充分的自由，它会教你想要知道的事，因为这是你将内在信息向外传达的方式。然后你从自己的创造中学习，而物质心智通过手在未经算计下所做的事来学习。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 9 of The Seth Material (Sessions 422-510)
quotes.source_file: ES-9-The Early Sessions-Book 9 of The Seth Material(422-510).json

quotes.text: Ideas of the "wise old man," and similar legends apply here, as do the mystical concepts of the powerful old woman. In their natural progression, and left alone, the old understand their own "visions" quite well. Body and mind operate beautifully together.
quotes.translation: "智慧老人"的概念及类似传说在此适用，正如强大老妇的神秘概念。在自然的发展过程中，若不加干预，老年人对自己"异象"的理解相当透彻。身体与心智完美地协同运作。

source_raw.title: eth's statement at the end of dictation for the 815th session, "I will try to begin work on our book in a more predictable fashion," reflected his good intent, but things didn't turn out that way. Jane and I let the holiday season intervene to some extent, and Session 816, which came through the day after Christmas, didn't concern book work at all. Then, starting in early January, we held eight sessions having to do with questions we'd put off dealing with for a long time; some were personal and some were not. We stayed with our Monday-Saturday evening session routine, though, and kept busy with all of our other projects.1

source_raw.title: While Jane has been enjoying many periods of ease and relaxation, she's also had bouts of blueness over her general stiffness and walking difficulties [her "symptoms"]. But she's finally dispensed with the last stages of her cold, which had turned out to be much heavier than mine, and is feeling a resurgence of energy for the sessions. Her own work has been going well for the most part, however--she expects to finish Chapter 12 of God of Jane tomorrow. Because of her concentration on that hook she hasn't done much on her book of poetry, If We Live Again, since late February; and as I mentioned in the Preface for Dreams, she laid aside her third Seven novel, Oversoul Seven and the Museum of Time, in May 1979 when she began God of Jane. source_raw.title: See the opening notes for Session 918, which Jane held on June 2 for Chapter 8 of Dreams. I referred to the strong local opposition to venting radioactive krypton gas from the contaminated containment building at Three Mile Island. An estimated several thousand people, not trusting the credibility of statements about safety that had been made by federal and private officials, left the area before company technicians finally began the long-delayed venting on June 29. All went well: The radiation released into the atmosphere was far below permissible limits. Surprisingly, the procedure was completed in only 13 days--considerably less than the estimated three to four weeks required for the job. The still-wary populace returned. Twelve days after the venting was completed, two engineers from TMI entered the enormous containment building on the first brief inspection trip to gather photographic, radiation, and other data.

quotes.text: One of Ruburt's students wondered whether or not there was any kind of organization in the immediate after-death experiences. Since this is a question that will come into many minds, I will deal with it here.
quotes.translation: 鲁柏的一位学生想知道，在死亡后的即刻体验中是否存在某种组织。由于这个问题会出现在许多人的心智中，我将在此加以探讨。

quotes.text: The back room idea, however, will serve to reinforce the private nature of the sessions in your own minds. All work dealing with other people generally will be done in whatever room class sessions are held.
quotes.translation: 然而，后室的概念将有助于在你们自己的心智中强化这些课程的私密性质。所有涉及他人的工作通常将在任何举办班级课程的房间里进行。

quotes.text: You are not aware of how the body performs its many involuntary functions. The conscious mind could not handle all that data, but those functions perfectly mirror your consciously held ideas and beliefs.
quotes.translation: 你并不了解身体如何执行其众多非自主功能。意识心无法处理所有那些数据，但这些功能完美地反映了你有意识地持有的观念和信念。
quotes.book: The Nature of Personal Reality
quotes.source_file: 10-02-10-02The Nature of Personal Reality_ - Roberts, Jane.json

quotes.text: Psychological time so-called belongs to the inner self, that is to the mind. It is however a connective, a portion of one of the inner senses, which we will call for convenience the second inner sense.
quotes.translation: 所谓心理时间属于内在自体，即属于心智。然而，它是一个连接物，是内在感官的一部分，为方便起见，我们称之为第二内在感官。

quotes.text: Jack Kennedy himself had a premonition of events and even in the midst of action he was prepared for death. His subconscious mind always knew the true nature of death and flirted with it consciously.
quotes.translation: 杰克·肯尼迪本人对事件有预知，甚至在行动中他也已准备好面对死亡。他的潜意识心始终知道死亡的真实本质，并有意识地与之调情。

source_raw.title: (To my surprise last Friday, October 21, I received a call from an old fiend, Bill Ward, with whom I used to do comic books about 1940-2. He asked me to help him, probably on a regular basis, with some work, and I said yes. The work, involving inking, arrived Sunday. Wendell Crowley is a boy hood friend of Wards, and also an old friend of mine; he was my editor in New York City for some years after World War 11. I was working with him in the early 1950s. Also, see Session 290.

quotes.text: The solutions lie in the conscious mind -- I cannot emphasize this too strongly -- and in those beliefs that you accept about the nature of reality and, specifically, about the nature of your being.
quotes.translation: 解决方案存在于意识心之中——我再怎么强调这一点也不为过——以及存在于你接受的那些关于实相本质、特别是关于你自身存在本质的信念之中。

quotes.text: The conscious mind cannot handle that kind of multidimensional creativity, yet it can expand into a kind of new recognition when it is carried along, still being itself, by its own theme.

quotes.text: The inverted time system recognizes the actual nature of time, however. There is room in this system for a rather complete explanation of the mind's associative processes.
